hotspots.handoff: W2 owns opaque Dash state plus Complete effect/source aggregate CAS；W8 必须用单一 PostgreSQL transaction 实现 DashCompleteAtomicCommit，不得拆分 source mutation 与 receipt ledger
Native owner 已物理删除 legacy driver/journal/context route，只导出 Complete service registration producer 与 typed callbacks；W7 清理跨 owner consumers，W8 装配唯一 producer
W2 patch and clean tip exclude lock changes; component tests use a temporary resolved lock and restore frozen base; W8 regenerates and commits the only activation lock from combined final manifests
